data.title: Boysen Unveils 'Color Stories': Transforming Limitless Paint Colors into Interactive Filipino Narratives
data.description: In Makati City, Philippines on April 8, 2026, Boysen, the top paint brand in the country, partnered with creative agency TBWA\SMP to introduce Boysen Color Stories. This innovative digital platform showcases the brand's vast range of paint colors in a new way.

data.title: TRX Gold Reports Robust Recovery Rates from Recent Study and Significant Increase in Plant Expansion Scope
data.description: In Toronto on April 8, 2026, TRX Gold Corporation (TSX: TRX) (NYSE American: TRX) shared updates on metallurgical test work at the Buckreef Gold Project. The Company is thrilled to report progress in optimizing the flowsheet and planning for a significant expansion of the processing plant beyond what was outlined in the May 2025 Preliminary Economic Assessment (PEA). This expansion aims to enhance operations at Buckreef Gold and advance development plans.

data.description: The new SureColor V4000 printer introduces quality prints on various materials for indoor/outdoor signage, fine art, and promotional items. data.title: LDO price may reach $0.36-$0.40 by late April '26, with RSI at 56.06 and strong bullish momentum. Technical analysis indicates targets within two weeks if support remains.
data.description: The latest data on LDO indicates a strong upward trend, as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 56.06 and the price is close to the resistance level of the Bollinger Bands. Based on technical analysis, it is predicted that the stock may reach targets between $0.36 and $0.40 in the next two weeks, provided that the current support level remains intact.

data.title: Powered by Nmbr, Paiday Introduces Industry-First Payroll Model for Accounting Firms
data.description: In Toronto, Nmbr, the first embedded payroll infrastructure provider in Canada, has collaborated with Paiday, a payroll platform tailored for accounting firms, to introduce a new payroll solution catered to the current operations of Canadian businesses. Through this partnership, Paiday utilizes Nmbr’s embedded payroll infrastructure to create a payroll system customized for accounting firms, enabling compliant payroll processes to operate seamlessly within their platforms.

data.title: Flik Unveils Breakthrough Generative AI Agent with 50,000 Already on Waitlist
data.description: In Los Angeles, a company named Flik has introduced a generative AI agent that can create text, image, video, and audio content. This AI agent is setting a high standard for safety, protecting likeness, and safeguarding intellectual property. Flik has gained significant attention by amassing a waitlist of 50,000 individuals before opening to the public. The company has secured backing from top investors like A. Capital, SV Angel, Y Combinator, as well as notable individuals including Jason Ma, Bryan J. Pascual, Seth Demsey, Patrick Finnegan, and Will Makris.

data.title: FriendliAI Appoints Brian Yoo, Former Moloco COO, as Chief Business Officer to Drive Next Phase of Hypergrowth
data.description: In San Francisco, FriendliAI, a leading AI Inference Cloud platform, has appointed Brian Yoo as Chief Business Officer. Yoo, formerly with Moloco, will oversee global commercial operations, go-to-market strategies, and partnerships as FriendliAI expands its high-performance AI inference infrastructure globally. Yoo, known for his operational and strategic scaling acumen, brings valuable experience to the role. Previously serving as Chief Opera, Yoo's appointment comes as FriendliAI gears up for rapid growth.

data.title: Real Messenger Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notification Letter Regarding Stockholders’ Equity Deficiency
data.description: Real Messenger Corporation, a leading chat-based real estate platform traded on Nasdaq under the symbol RMSG, recently disclosed that Nasdaq issued a notice on April 6, 2026. The notification cited the Company's reported stockholders' equity at $1,110,873 in an unaudited financial report filed with the SEC on March 31, 2026. This figure falls short of Nasdaq's stipulated minimum stockholders' equity mandate of $2,500,000 according to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1). As a result, Real Messenger is currently not in compliance with the Nasdaq Capital Market's listing requirements.
